title: Men's Bracketology: Rating Miami (Ohio) and other potential bid thieves
content: Last year, we had no bid thieves -- but as Champ Week gets underway, plenty of teams look vulnerable.

title: Men's Bubble Watch: Iowa still looks tourney-bound; streaking USF needs some help
content: The Hawkeyes nearly pulled an upset, solidifying their slot. USF keeps winning, but that might not be enough.

title: Sources: Raiders set to release veteran QB Smith
content: The Raiders are set to release quarterback Geno Smith, barring a trade, before the start of the new league year, sources told ESPN's Adam Schefter.

title: Ogunbowale arrested following Unrivaled title win
content: Dallas Wings guard Arike Ogunbowale was arrested and charged with misdemeanor battery in Miami early Thursday morning after she allegedly punched a man in the face, according to police records.

title: Achilles healed: Celtics OK Tatum for Fri. return
content: Jayson Tatum is officially available for the Celtics' Friday night home game against the Mavericks. Tatum suffered a torn right Achilles tendon in the playoffs less than 10 months ago.

title: Source: Rams re-sign Curl in another DB splash
content: The Rams are re-signing safety Kam Curl to a three-year, $36 million contract, a source confirmed to ESPN.

title: Sources: Watson deal reworked to shrink cap hit
content: The Browns have once again restructured the contract of quarterback Deshaun Watson, league sources confirmed to ESPN, a move that frees close to $36 million in cap space and lowers what was the largest cap hit in the NFL in 2026.

title: Sources: Bills releasing CB Johnson, WR Samuel
content: The Bills are releasing starting nickelback Taron Johnson and wide receiver Curtis Samuel as they work to get cap compliant, sources told ESPN.

title: Suns forward Brooks arrested on suspected DUI
content: Suns forward Dillon Brooks was arrested early Friday morning for suspicion of driving under the influence in Scottsdale, Arizona, police said.

title: Hawks send Foligno to play with brother on Wild
content: The Wild have added Bobby Brink in a trade with the Philadelphia Flyers, a source told ESPN's Greg Wyshynski. The Minnesota native has 13 goals and 13 assists this season.

title: 🏀 Hoops coach allegedly moonlighted as a pimp
content: Multiple dismissals have occurred at Cal State Bakersfield as an investigation probes who knew what and when.

title: 2026 NFL free agency: Biggest needs, predictions for 32 teams
content: Malik Willis, Tyler Linderbaum, Mike Evans and Jaelan Phillips are worth keeping an eye on when free agency opens March 11.

title: Projecting contracts for 20 free agents: Can Alec Pierce earn north of $25M per year?
content: Dan Graziano made calls around the NFL to get a sense of how contracts might look for 20 free agents.

title: Why Tatum is coming back now and what it means for Boston
content: Here's the latest on Tatum's return to Boston after a devastating Achilles injury -- and how it could shift the NBA's balance of power with just weeks to go in the season.

title: Barnwell: Sizing up the DJ Moore, Trent McDuffie blockbuster trades from all angles
content: The NFL's trade market has been active, with the Bills dealing for DJ Moore and the Rams adding Trent McDuffie. What do the moves mean for all four teams?

title: DJ Moore to Bills: Bears to eye Linderbaum? Impact on Allen, draft
content: Will trading Moore's contract enable Chicago to bolster its offensive line? That's one of eight questions we answer.

title: World Baseball Classic predictions: Will Japan repeat or is United States the team to beat?
content: Our experts make their picks for every round of the 2026 WBC -- from pool play through the championship game.

title: Women's Bracketology: Big wins for BYU, Arizona State push them right to the bubble
content: Two teams making the most of Champ Week? BYU and Arizona State, which now both sit just beyond the 68.

title: 'Baby Jokic': What makes Cameron Boozer unstoppable in his pursuit of greatness
content: The star freshman has led teams to championships throughout his basketball career. Can he do it again for Duke?

title: Ranked: The 10 worst Premier League teams that spent too much money on being bad
content: Tottenham are on pace for Premier League relegation despite spending lots of cash. Where do they rank among the worst teams relative to spending?

title: The best teams in Europe: Can anybody touch Barcelona, Bayern?
content: As the calendar turns into March, we've seen more than enough in 2026 so far to rank the most in-form clubs.

title: 'Right now, I could be UFC champion': Bella Mir is the future face of fighting
content: With Dana White as her mentor, the daughter of heavyweight champ Frank grapples for an NCAA title this weekend.

title: 'I'll close my eyes': Diamondbacks' Counsell makes pro debut against father Craig's Cubs
content: Brady Counsell got his first reps as a Diamondback on Thursday when he was named to the club's roster for a spring training clash with the Cubs, who are managed by his father.

title: Inside a surprise dance performance from UCLA women's basketball stars
content: Lauren Betts, Gabriela Jaquez and Charlisse Leger-Walker high kicked their way onto the UCLA dance team.

title: The craziest F1 start ever? Why Australian Grand Prix might see chaos from the start
content: Grand prix starts have always held the potential for chaos, but this year there's almost guaranteed drama when the lights go out in Australia on Sunday. ESPN explains why.

title: Tyler Reddick is on the verge of rewriting NASCAR's history books
content: Reddick has won the first three races of 2026, but no one in NASCAR history has started a year with four straight. Can he become the first?

title: How a 21-year-old prodigy and a 38-year-old veteran ended up with the same fight
content: UFC 326 features a fight between Raul Rosas Jr. and Rob Font in an ultimate battle of youth vs. experience.

title: A look at MVP's fights on ESPN: Can Baumgardner become the face of women's boxing?
content: Andreas Hale and Nick Parkinson offer their take on MVP's newly announced bouts and the implications for the contenders and champions involved.

title: Mike Clay's rookie rankings for 2026: Jeremiyah Love on top
content: With the NFL draft fast approaching, Mike Clay provides his rankings and analysis of 80 of the top skill position players from the combine and what to expect in fantasy.

title: 2026 MLB betting guide: Our favorite prop bet for every team
content: Looking for a prop bet on your favorite team? Our experts break down the standouts for all 30 MLB teams.

title: Seven U.S. Paralympians to watch at the Milan Cortina Games
content: From 36-year-old legend Oksana Masters to 16-year-old Meg Gustafson, here's who to know as the Paralympics begin.

title: Transfer rumors, news: Arsenal forced to let one key player go this summer
content: Arsenal must offload a first-term player in the summer to balance their books, but who could it be? Transfer Talk has the latest.

title: US says India’s Russian oil waiver short-term step to stabilise global prices
content: The US has granted India a temporary waiver to buy Russian oil, aiming to stabilize global prices amid Middle East supply disruptions. This short-term measure allows India to access millions of barrels of Russian crude currently at sea, easing immediate pressure on refineries worldwide.

title: Microsoft becomes first company to say it is not 'abandoning' Anthropic
content: Microsoft will continue to integrate Anthropic's AI models into its products, despite the Department of War designating the startup as a supply-chain risk. The company's legal team reviewed the designation and concluded Anthropic's offerings, excluding those for the Department of War, can remain available to customers.

title: India gave safe harbour to another Iranian ship days before IRIS Dena was sunk by US
content: Just days before the Iranian warship IRIS Dena was sunk by a US strike, India provided urgent assistance to another Iranian vessel, IRIS Lavan.  The ship, facing technical issues, was granted emergency docking at Kochi port on March 1st and arrived on March 4th. Its 183 crew members are currently housed at Indian naval facilities.

title: White House glorifies Iran strike with Hollywood video, sparks backlash
content: The White House posted a 42-second, trailer-style montage celebrating US–Israeli strikes on Iran, blending real drone footage with Hollywood, anime, and video-game clips. Phrases like “Justice the American Way” frame war as spectacle, drawing viral attention and criticism. Observers condemned the surreal, propagandistic tone, noting copyright concerns, ironic film choices, and the ethical risk of trivializing deadly military operations.

title: JP Morgan CEO does not agree with 'work from home', says 4-day-week possible with AI
content: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon, previously skeptical of remote work, now sees AI as a potential game-changer, predicting it could shorten the work week to four days within decades. While acknowledging AI's capacity to boost productivity and improve work-life balance, Dimon also cautioned about potential job disruptions and urged proactive preparation for labor market shifts.

title: 'Look in the mirror': Ex-England pacer questions Buttler’s future after T20 World Cup flop
content: Former England pacer Steve Harmison has cast doubt on Jos Buttler's continued motivation for international cricket following a disappointing T20 World Cup 2026 campaign. Buttler struggled significantly, scoring only 87 runs and failing to register a half-century. Harmison urged Buttler to self-reflect on his desire to continue, suggesting it might be time for a new generation if his passion wanes.

title: Nepal elections results 2026: Full list of winners
content: Nepal's Gen-Z uprising has yielded early results in parliamentary polls, with the Rastriya Swatantra Party (RSP) making significant inroads. The RSP has secured key seats in Kathmandu and is leading in over 110 constituencies nationwide. Notably, RSP leader Balendra Shah is ahead of former PM KP Sharma Oli in Jhapa-5.

title: Vehicles torched, roads blocked: Protest in Delhi after man killed in Holi clash
content: Protests erupted in southwest Delhi's Uttam Nagar after a 26-year-old man died following a Holi clash. Tarun succumbed to injuries after a dispute over coloured water escalated into a physical fight. Demonstrators blocked a major road, set vehicles ablaze, and demanded strict action against the accused.

title: Oracle layoffs may go up to 30,000 as company faces cash crunch to meet OpenAI commitment
content: Oracle is reportedly planning significant job cuts, potentially thousands, to manage a growing cash crunch fueled by its massive AI data center expansion. This restructuring, costing over $1.6 billion, aims to address financial pressures from a $300 billion OpenAI partnership. The company's stock has seen a substantial decline as Wall Street scrutinizes its aggressive spending and debt.

title: T20 WC final: Should India persist with 'weak link' Abhishek or bring in Rinku
content: As India gear up for the ICC Men's T20 World Cup 2026 final against New Zealand, a debate rages over opener Abhishek Sharma's place. Despite low scores, some back him as an 'X factor', while others advocate for Rinku Singh's inclusion, citing predictability. The team management faces a crucial decision on continuity versus a late change.

title: 'Where’s the rest of you?': McCullum stunned by Rohit Sharma’s fitness - Watch
content: Former India captain Rohit Sharma's striking physical transformation drew admiration from England's Eoin Morgan and Brendon McCullum at the Wankhede Stadium.  Sharma, present as a guest, engaged warmly with players from both sides, offering encouragement and insights before India's crucial T20 World Cup semi-final victory. His presence added to the pre-match buzz.

title: Nazi salute costs Real Madrid as UEFA slaps $17,000 fine after fan's gesture
content: UEFA has fined Real Madrid 15,000 euros and ordered a partial stadium closure. This action follows a supporter's Nazi salute before a Champions League match. The club identified and removed the individual. Real Madrid condemned the gesture. The incident occurred before their match against Benfica. The Spanish club will face Manchester City next.

title: Notice to remove Lok Sabha Speaker Om Birla will be taken up on March 9
content: Lok Sabha will debate a rare motion to remove Speaker Om Birla on Monday, with 118 opposition MPs backing the notice. Allegations include partisan conduct and silencing dissent. The resolution requires 50 MPs to stand in support to proceed. Both BJP and Congress have issued whips for MPs to attend.

title: US-Iran war: Gold being sold at steep cuts in Dubai; available at $30 an ounce discount
content: The United Arab Emirates, particularly Dubai, serves as a major hub for refining and exporting gold to buyers across Asia. It also acts as a transit point for shipments arriving from Switzerland, the United Kingdom and several African countries.

title: Nagpur Duo Win MasterChef India: Vikram and Ajinkya lift trophy in historic finale
content: In a remarkable display of culinary skill, the dynamic brother duo from Nagpur, Vikram and Ajinkya Gandhe, have triumphed in the latest season of MasterChef India, themed 'Pride of India.' This year, the competition introduced a fresh Jodi format, bringing together 50 pairs to showcase their talents.

title: 'Make Iran Great Again': Trump demands Tehran's 'unconditional surrender'
content: Trump's remark come amid a sharp escalation in regional tensions following a joint US and Israeli military strike on Iranian territory on February 28. The attack reportedly killed Iran’s Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei along with several senior figures, prompting a strong response from Tehran. Earlier on Thursday, Trump said he wanted to be personally involved in the selection of Iran’s next supreme leader following the death of Khamenei in last week’s US Israel strike, according to a report by Axios.

title: 'Main hoon na': Nitish reassures party amid RS move; gives nod for son's entry
content: Janata Dal (United) leaders expressed pain over Chief Minister Nitish Kumar's move to Delhi as a Rajya Sabha MP, but he reassured them, stating "main hoon na" and clearing the path for his son Nishant's political debut.  Party lawmakers were assured of his continued guidance for Bihar. This decision follows Nitish's Rajya Sabha nomination alongside Amit Shah.

title: Russia giving Iran real-time intel on US warships, aircraft: Report
content: Russia is reportedly sharing intelligence on US military assets in the Middle East with Iran, potentially aiding Tehran's targeting of American forces. This alleged assistance, detailed by officials, could explain the precision of recent Iranian strikes. While the US downplays Russian involvement, the move highlights shifting geopolitical alliances amid ongoing regional conflicts.

title: 'No shortage of energy in India': Govt strikes positive note as Iran war hits oil supply
content: Union Minister Hardeep Singh Puri assured citizens there is no energy shortage in India despite West Asian geopolitical tensions.  The country has diversified its crude oil imports, with significant supplies now coming from Russia and new LPG contracts with the US, ensuring comfortable availability of fuel.

title: Seattle Kraken interested in Florida Panthers' Mackie Samoskevich ahead of trade deadline.
content: Despite a struggling season, the Panthers are reportedly fielding trade interest for young forward Mackie Samoskevich from the Seattle Kraken. While Samoskevich's scoring has dipped, Florida values his potential and defensive growth, demanding a significant return. Seattle, with ample draft capital and a Michigan connection to Samoskevich, could be a suitor, though Shane Wright is off the table.

title: Sanju Samson emerges as India’s only contender in Player of the Tournament race
content: Sanju Samson has become a key player for India in the T20 World Cup 2026. He delivered crucial performances, including a 97 against West Indies and 89 in the semi-final against England. Samson's form earned him a Player of the Tournament nomination. He now holds the record for most sixes by an Indian in a single T20 World Cup edition.

title: Nitish Kumar heads to Delhi, how JD(U) faces its defining test in Bihar
content: Bihar's political landscape shifts as Nitish Kumar opts for a Rajya Sabha seat, stepping down as Chief Minister. This move marks the end of an era dominated by Jayaprakash Narayan's disciples and leaves the Janata Dal (United) in uncharted territory without a clear successor.

title: Happy Women's Day 2026: Top 50 wishes, messages, and quotes to share
content: This International Women’s Day, share a beautiful quote, message, or wish with your women friends, sisters, wife, daughters, and mother, and celebrate them with kind words curated just for them, from our list below.

title: 10m barrels & counting: Indian refiners buy Russian crude to counter Middle East cisis
content: Shipping data compiled by Bloomberg shows that roughly 15 million barrels of Russian oil are currently held on tankers in the Arabian Sea and the Bay of Bengal. In addition, vessels carrying about 7 million barrels are anchored near Singapore.

title: 'Send the chopper': Stuck in India, Windies player asks Cristiano to 'rescue' him
content: West Indies spinner Akeal Hosein expressed frustration over the team's delayed return from India following their T20 World Cup exit, even jokingly asking Cristiano Ronaldo for a rescue.  International travel disruptions due to escalating geopolitical tensions have impacted the squad's journey home, despite Cricket West Indies arranging a charter flight.

title: Gulf to stop energy exports within weeks, warns Qatar
content: Gulf energy exporters face potential export shutdowns within weeks due to escalating Iran-US-Israel conflict, warns Qatar's energy minister. This could trigger oil prices to $150 a barrel and severely impact global economies. Qatar has already declared force majeure on LNG exports after an Iranian drone strike, with full recovery expected to take months.

title: Not Varun Chakravarthy, Kapil Dev names this cricketer as 'number one bowler'
content: Kapil Dev lauded Jasprit Bumrah as the world's number one bowler after his crucial spell in India's T20 World Cup semi-final win over England. He also praised Sanju Samson's consistent batting. India now faces New Zealand in the final, aiming for multiple historic achievements.

title: Amitabh Bachchan expands his real-estate purchase in Ayodhya
content: Amitabh Bachchan has expanded his Ayodhya real estate portfolio with a new 2.67-acre land purchase valued at Rs 35 crore. This significant investment was confirmed by the developers of 'The Sarayu' project.

title: 'Man of the match was Bumrah': Pathan disagrees with official award decision
content: Irfan Pathan lauded Jasprit Bumrah's match-winning spell in India's T20 World Cup semi-final win over England. Pathan highlighted Bumrah's exceptional skill set and ability to perform under pressure, stating India is fortunate to have such a rare talent. Bumrah's crucial overs, including pinpoint yorkers, significantly hampered England's chase, despite a high-scoring encounter.

title: Inside the paradox of Mexico's never-ending war on drugs
content: The decades-long war on drugs, initiated by Nixon, has devolved into a geopolitical quagmire. The recent death of cartel leader El Mencho, hailed as a victory, quickly led to widespread chaos, demonstrating how successes in combating drug trafficking often breed deeper crises and more violence across Latin America.

title: Kunal Kemmu reacts to Deepika Padukone’s 8-hour shift row
content: Following Deepika Padukone's reported demand for an eight-hour workday, actors like Kunal Kemmu and Saif Ali Khan discussed the realities of show business. They emphasized that choosing a career in acting comes with inherent expectations and that professionals must understand the commitment required for success and the lifestyle they desire.

title: $3,700,000,000 in first 100 hours: The cost of Trump's Op Epic Fury against Iran
content: A new CSIS report reveals the US military campaign against Iran has cost an estimated $3.7 billion in its first 100 hours, with most of this spending unbudgeted. The daily cost is approximately $891.4 million, driven by extensive munitions use and advanced system deployment. The Pentagon may seek a $50 billion supplemental funding request from Congress to replenish depleted resources.

title: ‘You are the X-factor’: Team India backs Varun Chakravarthy ahead of final
content: Despite a costly outing in the semifinal, India's team management and senior players back mystery spinner Varun Chakravarthy as their potential match-winner for the T20 World Cup final.  Vice-captain Axar Patel emphasised the importance of mental strength and trusting his plans, believing Varun Chakravarthy can still deliver a crucial performance.

title: Amid US-Iran conflict, don't forget this war: It matters more for India
content: Pakistan's escalating conflict with the Taliban in Afghanistan is turning deadly, diverting attention from the US-Israel-Iran war.  Operation Ghazab lil Haq targets militants, but civilian areas are reportedly hit, causing fear and displacement. The fighting exposes a strategic reality that has been building for years: Pakistan’s long-standing Taliban strategy has collapsed, and the fallout is now spilling across South Asia.

title: 'I will not relent': Judge keeps Shilo Sanders locked in $12 million bankruptcy fight
content: A federal judge just refused to let Shilo Sanders walk away from a trustee’s complaint tied to an $11.89 million judgment and alleged bankruptcy law violations. The ruling keeps his NIL money under a microscope, pushes the case toward trial, and leaves his football future hanging on a 2015 hallway incident that will not go away.

title: Allu Arjun extends financial support to actress Pavala Shyamala
content: Telugu actor Allu Arjun has extended significant financial support to veteran actress Pavala Shyamala, who is facing severe health and financial difficulties. The 'Pushpa' star has arranged for a fixed monthly sum of Rs. 10,000 to aid Shyamala and her daughter, a gesture widely praised by fans for its consistent and thoughtful nature.

title: Youth, student groups criticise Karnataka Budget over jobs, education funding
content: Student and youth organisations have criticised the State Budget for 2026-27, alleging that it fails to address the pressing issues of unemployment among youth and the declining state of public education

title: YSRCP shirking responsibility of raising public issues in Assembly, says A.P. CM
content: The ₹3.32 lakh-crore budget has been approved in the Assembly, but a concerted effort is needed to spend every single rupee judiciously, says Naidu

title: Woman in Assam becomes first to get India citizenship after two years in detention camp
content: Dipali Das, who entered India in February 1988, was declared a non-citizen by the Foreigners’ Tribunal in Silchar

title: 56 Naan Mudhalvan scheme trainees clear civil services exam
content: All India Civil Services Coaching Centre, the institute of the State government, has registered an increase in results owing to Naan Mudhalvan Scheme.

title: Regulating internet is Centre’s domain, social media ban imposed by A.P., Karnataka may hit jurisdictional barrier
content: Recently, the Union Minister for Electronics and Information Technology Ashwini Vaishnaw said that the government was discussing age-based restrictions on social media use

title: Budget has increased debt burden, say BJP and JD (S)
content: In his pursuit of records,  Siddaramaiah has pushed the State’s economy in disarray: Union Minister Kumaraswamy

title: Pinarayi slams Centre’s ‘submission’ before US over strikes on Iran
content: The country being tied to imperial powers is a matter of concern, and strong public opinion should arise against it, says Chief Minister

title: Watch: Iranian warship strike near Sri Lanka raises questions for India
content: An Iranian warship was struck by a U.S. submarine near Sri Lanka, days after participating in India’s MILAN 2026 naval exercise. The incident raises major questions about India’s role in the Indian Ocean and the strategic balance between Washington and Tehran.

title: West Asia conflict: 15,000 passengers brought back by Indian airlines from conflict-hit region
content: As many as 51 flights are planned on Saturday (March 7, 2026)— the highest since airstrikes in the region beganon February 28, 2026

title: Budget reflects State’s continued focus on diverse growth: trade bodies
content: FKCCI welcomes several important initiatives aimed at strengthening the industrial ecosystem and creating new opportunities for investment, innovation, and employment

title: Iran vessel with 183 sailors docked in Kochi on March 4
content: IRIS Lavan has been docked at Kochi since March 4 as the vessel had developed technical issues. “Its crew of 183 are currently accommodated at naval facilities in Kochi,” the source said

title: India must ask U.S. why it is targeting Iranian ships in Indian Ocean: Iran Minister Khatibzadeh
content: Iran’s Deputy Foreign Minister Saeed Khatibzadeh says his country is a “responsible power” and has not shut the Strait of Hormuz, he says the attack on Iran is “based on a lie” and pitches for diplomacy as the “only option”

title: Proposal to rename Victoria Hospital in Bengaluru takes doctors, patients by surprise
content: Doctors at the hospital say they had no prior information about the proposal until it was announced in the Budget

title: Capex slows as committed expenses balloon and revenue takes a hit
content: Karnataka pins hopes on increasing State’s own tax revenue and increase borrowing to push capital expenditure

title: A.P. liquor scam: ED attaches properties worth ₹441 crore of key accused
content: Assets belonging to Kesireddy Rajasekhara Reddy. Booneti Chanakya and Donthireddy Vasudeva Reddy attached under PMLA as probe points to alleged ₹3,500 crore loss to State exchequer during previous regime

title: ₹2,000 crore electric bus programme with World Bank aid announced in Karnataka Budget 2026
content: The government also plans to induct 4,000 electric buses into the fleets of various State-run transport corporations as part of the initiative

title: Karnataka’s GSDP expected to grow at 8.10% against India’s GDP growth of 7.4%
content: While Bengaluru Urban has the highest per capita income at ₹8.55 lakh, Kalaburagi has the lowest with ₹1.44 lakh.

title: Trapped in toxicity: Residents of Visakhapatnam’s Gajuwaka struggle for breath of fresh air
content: The Garbage Transfer Station (GTS) located in Ward 76 of Gajuwaka amid densely populated colonies, has become a source of severe pollution and health issues. Locals complain of constant foul odour, black coal dust, mosquito menace, respiratory and skin ailments. Despite repeated agitations, the residents fear that long-term health consequences are imminent due to official apathy, explains Harish Gilai

title: Lok Sabha likely to debate resolution seeking Speaker Om Birla’s removal on March 9
content: Both the BJP and the Congress have issued whips mandating their members’ presence in the House from March 9 to 11, in anticipation of the resolution by 118 Opposition MPs in the Lok Sabha seeking Birla’s removal for partisan behaviour slated for debate

title: New Intermediate Ring Road connecting Tumakuru and Mysuru Roads, pedestrian push in Budget for Bengaluru
content: The State govt. has also allowed the new corporations to mobilise resources for development works through ‘municipal bonds’ based on their balance sheets

title: Nishant Kumar to join JD(U) on March 8, as Nitish promises to stick around
content: Nishant Kumar was not present at the emotional meeting of JD(U) leaders who offered him their “wholehearted” support; RJD’s sole RS candidate Amarendra Dhari Singh claims he has the votes to win

title: BRS faults Congress for giving full-page ads in Kerala with public money
content: Former Minister Harish Rao accuses Congress of funding a misleading poll campaign in Kerala with promises it failed to fulfil in Telangana

title: Karnataka Budget 2026: Aerospace common facility, flight training school to be set up
content: Siddaramaiah also announced that ₹200 crore has been earmarked for the development of seven domestic airports in the State

title: Watch: The Namakkal case that changed Indian elections forever
content: Can courts intervene when an election is already underway? In 1952, a rejected candidate from Namakkal took this question to the Supreme Court in the landmark N.P. Ponnuswami v. Returning Officer case.

title: New bodies for upliftment of deprived communities
content: In the year 2026-27, a total of ₹44,632 crore has been provided under Karnataka Scheduled Castes Sub-Plan (SCSP) and Tribal Sub-Plan (TSP)

title: Man gets life imprisonment in murder case
content: The accused beat the victim to death and took away Rs.750 from his pocket, said GRP CI J.V. Ramana, who investigated the case

title: CPI(M) flags anomalies in voter rolls, seeks clarity from election commission
content: M.V. Jayarajan cites the discrepancy between the voter rolls prepared by the State Election Commission and the final roll published by the Election Commission of India following the SIR to highlight the party’s concerns

title: I&B Ministry orders halt to TRP reporting of TV news channels for four weeks
content: The order has been issued in view of the “unwarranted sensationalism” in reporting the ongoing war in West Asia involving the U.S., Israel and Iran

title: Kerala shines in Civil Services exam; over 10 candidates in top 200
content: Sreeja J.S. from Naruvamoodu in Thiruvananthapuram secures 57th rank in her  first attempt, overcoming several oddsTHIRUVANANTHAPURAM

title: 9,000 posts in health sector filled in 20 months, says A.P. Minister
content: On an average, 450 vacancies have been filled every month under the government’s ‘zero vacancy’ policy aimed at strengthening healthcare facilities, says Satya Kumar Yadav

title: Mamata’s dharna in Kolkata is an attempt to disrupt SIR: West Bengal BJP
content: The BJP says that the Mamata Banerjee is abdicating her constitutional responsibility by conducting a dharna against the Election Commission of India

title: Andhra Pradesh Legislative Assembly adjourned sine die
content: House met for 15 days and conducted proceedings for 72 hours and 14 minutes, says Speaker Ayyanna Patrudu

title: Velur village to launch protest against removal of ‘St. Thomas’ from 103-year-old school’s name
content: Name changed after  school management handed it over to State government a few years ago. Demand to restore original name had been submitted to government and representations had been sent to Education Minister. Despite these efforts, no response was received from authorities so far

title: Learn new skills to thrive amid AI driven job shifts: JNTU GV Vice-Chancellor
content: Students must focus on emerging technology courses and industry relevant skills as recruitment strategies evolve in the era of Artificial Intelligence, he says

title: A.P.’s revenue deficit exceeded FRBM target of 2.7% in 2024-25, says report
content: Fiscal deficit reamined at 5.05% against the mandated 4% ceiling, driving total borrowings to ₹81,071 crore, crowding out capital expenditure, worsening debt sustainability, says Accounts at a Glance for 2024-25 prepared by the Principal Accountant General of A.P.

title: Kerala govt. publishes terms of reference of 12th pay panel
content: The ToR requires the commission to suggest measures to make the Civil Services more people-friendly and efficient and examine the “multi-faceted” issues faced by women employees

title: ‘Welcome to Kerala’ signboard sparks tension in the Nilgiris
content: An official said residents and political outfits raised objections after officials of Kerala’s Public Works Department placed the board at Thaloor on the evening of Thursday (March 5, 2026)

title: Puthuyuga Yatra to conclude in Thiruvananthapuram on Saturday
content: Rahul Gandhi, Leader of the Opposition in the Lok Sabha, will address a public meeting in this connection

title: Focus on infrastructure, questions over AB-ArK package revision
content: Chief Minister Siddaramaiah announced a ₹900-crore grant for infrastructure development in the health sector.

title: ₹500 crore for suburban rail, 41 km of metro line to be operational in 2026-27, says Chief Minister
content: Land acquisition for Corridor-2, connecting Benniganahalli and Chikkabanavara, has already been completed and construction works are currently under way, says Siddaramaiah

title: High war-risk premiums for airline insurance to push up airfares
content: Extra premiums range from 0.075% to 0.1% of aircraft value for each return flight, translating to fare hikes of about ₹20,000 on Gulf routes; rising oil prices and operating costs may hit domestic fares too

title: NGT sets aside SEIAA rejection of quarry near Vallanadu Blackbuck Sanctuary
content: The Tribunal has directed the Tamil Nadu State Environmental Impact Assessment Authority to reconsider within six weeks the rejection of the proposed rough stone and gravel quarry and pass fresh orders

title: Ciza Thomas assumes charge as SSUS Vice-Chancellor
content: She assumed charge a day after Governor Rajendra Vishwanath Arlekar removed K.K. Geethakumary from the post of Vice-Chancellor of SSUS with immediate effect

title: Muddada Ravichandra takes oath as TTD Executive Officer
content: He promises to review the suggestions received from devotees to further enhance the spiritual experience of the pilgrims

title: Karnataka’s agri sector clocks a robust growth of 9.1%, up from previous years
content: But experts say farmers will feel it only if measures are taken to translate sector’s growth into benefits for them

title: 'Trump, Netanyahu Greatest Tag Team In History': Israel PM's Adviser To NDTV
content: Ophir Falk, the foreign policy adviser to Benjamin Netanyahu, said Israel and the US do not want an endless war with Iran.

title: Nepal Election 2026 Results Live Updates: Balen Shah's RSP Close To Victory, Celebrations On Streets
content: Nepal General Election 2026 Results Live: The newly formed Rastriya Swatantra Party (RSP), led by former rapper Balendra Shah, was leading in the early counting of votes on Friday in Nepal's first general elections since the violent Gen Z protests

title: US Pressing Sri Lanka Not To Repatriate Iranian Ship's Crew: Report
content: The United States is pressing Sri Lanka's government not to repatriate the survivors from the Iranian warship it sank this week, as well as the crew of a second Iranian ship that is in Sri Lankan custody, according to reports.

title: Drugs Worth Rs 10 Crore Seized As Cops Bust Network Linking Nepal, Lanka
content: The Narcotics Control Bureau (NCB) has busted an international drug trafficking network operating between Nepal, India and Sri Lanka, seizing narcotics worth around Rs 10 crore and arresting five people.

title: Rajasthan Passes Bill Restricting Property Transfers In 'Disturbed Areas'
content: The Rajasthan assembly, on Wednesday, passed a divisive bill that would regulate property transfers in communally sensitive regions.

title: Russia Backing Iran In War With US-Israel By Sharing Military Intel: Report
content: Russia has entered the war between the US-Israel alliance and Iran, although indirectly. Russia is providing its strategic ally Iran with intelligence to help attack US warships and aircraft in the Middle East.

title: "Too Many Ill-Wishers": Russia To Not Disclose Data On Oil Export To India
content: Russia will not disclose the data on crude oil export to India and keep it secret from "too many ill-wishers", the Kremlin said on Friday.

title: India Allowed Another Iran Ship To Dock Days Before US Sank IRIS Dena: Sources
content: The sources said Iran asked India to "take in" its ship IRIS Lavan and the request was approved on Sunday.

title: US Economy Sheds 92,000 Jobs In February As Unemployment Ticks Up
content: The United States unexpectedly lost jobs in February while unemployment edged up, government data showed Friday, piling pressure on President Donald Trump's economic agenda as key midterm elections approach.

title: "Cuba Will Fall Soon, They Badly Want A Deal": Trump Amid Iran War
content: President Donald Trump said Friday that "Cuba is gonna fall pretty soon" in a renewed threat to the communist-ruled island already facing a US energy blockade.

title: Private Jets Emerge As Costly Escape Route From Gulf Amid Iran War
content: When Samuel Lait launched hisprivateflights firm focused on pet travel in Dubai on Saturday, he was expecting to receive queries from owners looking to travel withtheir pets betweentheglitzyGulfhub andtheUnited Kingdom.

title: 'Zionist Regime Made A Big Mistake': Khamenei's Account Issues Warning On X
content: Iran's late Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei's official account is still active even after joint US-Israeli airstrikes hit Tehran and killed him on February 28.

title: Kashmir To Lift Curbs From Tomorrow As Protests Over Khamenei's Death Ease
content: Security restrictions in Kashmir are being eased from tomorrow after week-long curbs were imposed to prevent protests over the killing of Iranian Supreme Leader Ayatollah Khamenei

title: US, Israel-Iran War News Live Updates: US Oil Price Soars Over 10% After Trump Demand On Iran
content: The raging war in the Middle East entered its seventh day on Friday, with the Israeli military announcing a "next phase" in the conflict and bombing Lebanon's Beirut.

title: 'No Deal With Iran Except Unconditional Surrender': Trump
content: US President Donald Trump on Friday demanded Iran's "unconditional surrender" as the only acceptable outcome to end hostilities, while promising to help rebuild the country's economy if Tehran complied and installed new leadership.

title: 'Don't Want People To Mock': Indian In US Army Slams Pro-Khamenei Protests
content: "But I have a question for you: I just want to know how the protests you are holding where you live, disturbing things in your area, are going to benefit you?" Shilpa Chaudhary asked protesters in India.

title: Hitting A Bullet With A Bullet: No Such Thing As Ballistic Missile Shield
content: Ballistic missile technology is crazy good. To try to stop an incoming ballistic missile is crazier, like "hitting a bullet with a bullet".

title: '85% Coverage': RBI Issues Draft Digital Fraud Compensation Guidelines
content: The Reserve Bank of India on Friday released draft guidelines for a compensation scheme aimed at protecting customers from digital fraud, offering coverage for up to 85% of the lost amount or a maximum of 25,000 rupees ($271.98).

title: India Has Enough Fuel, Refineries Asked To Push Up LPG Production: Sources
content: There are sufficient stocks of crude oil and petroleum products such as petrol, diesel, and LPG. The oil companies are also importing from countries outside the Gulf region to cover the disruption in supplies due to the Iran war.
